message:
test(fuzz): add signature parsing fuzz target for gufunc/fixed signatures

Fuzz parse_gufunc_signature and parse_fixed_signature_string with
arbitrary UTF-8 input to catch edge cases in signature syntax parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
